# Anduril demonstrates multi-domain unmanned systems command and control, undersea, and airborne capabilities at US Navy’s IBP 24.1

At the U.S. Navy's Integrated Battle Problem 24.1 exercise, Anduril used its Lattice software to command and control teams of heterogenous unmanned and autonomous assets operating in the air, on the sea, and below the surface across the Southern California Offshore Range.
